nasb.text: All these were cities fortified with high walls, gates and bars, besides a great many unwalled towns.

esv.text: All these were cities fortified with high walls, gates, and bars, besides very many unwalled villages.

cnv.text: 這些城都是以高牆作堡壘，有城門，有門閂；此外，還有很多沒有城牆的鄉村。

ccb.text: 这些城邑围墙高耸，门闩牢固。我们还占领了许多没有城墙的乡村。
